RegLoan Bank — Income / Bank Statement Verification Document VER-0006 Page 2 of 5 Statement of Account — continued Date Description Debit ($) Credit ($) Balance ($) 11/12/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 57 - 5,712 09/03/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 308 - 5,404 14/02/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 131 949 6,222 19/08/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT - 456 6,678 06/12/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - - 6,678 19/06/2025 UTILITY BILL 842 996 6,832 09/03/2025 UTILITY BILL - 1,599 8,431 10/07/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 260 1,058 9,229 14/02/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT 85 - 9,144 02/08/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT 240 2,421 11,325 24/05/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT 644 - 10,681 12/06/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT - 1,841 12,522 12/10/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 103 - 12,419 14/02/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY - - 12,419 22/02/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 121 592 12,890 27/08/2025 UTILITY BILL 726 - 12,164 09/01/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT 795 - 11,369 20/10/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 362 - 11,007 OK
